body:
修改于6/5/2023
一. clash程序
root运行 下载clash premium (https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash/releases/tag/premium) 解压保存为/usr/local/bin/clash 设置为systemd deamon 编辑/lib/systemd/system/clash.service
1#/lib/systemd/system/clash.service 2 3Description=A rule based proxy tunnel in Go 4After=network.target 5[Service] 6Type=simple 7Restart=on-abort 8ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/clash 9[Install] 10WantedBy=multi-user.target 默认运行目录为~/.config/clash, config.yaml要存放在工作目录中
1systemctl daemon-reload 2systemctl enable clash 二. 透明代理
开启ipv4/ipv6的转发
1echo "net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 2echo "net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 关闭systemd-resolved 服务, 让clash dns占有53端口 systemctl disable systemd-resolved
/etc/reslov.conf里我是设置为主路由(ros)的dns
iptables持久化
1apt install iptables-persistent netfilter-persistent 2netfilter-persistent save 3netfilter-persistent start 4iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.v4 5ip6tables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.v6 加载恢复
1iptables-restore < /etc/iptables/rules.v4 2ip6tables-restore < /etc/iptables/rules.v6 三. iptables (以下代码中192.168.10.87是我的clash host, 模式为tproxy)
1ipset create localnetwork hash:net 2ipset add localnetwork 127.0.0.0/8 3ipset add localnetwork 10.0.0.0/8 4ipset add localnetwork 192.168.0.0/16 5ipset add localnetwork 224.0.0.0/4 6ipset add localnetwork 172.16.0.0/12 7ipset add localnetwork 0.0.0.0/8 8ipset add localnetwork 169.254.0.0/16 9ipset add localnetwork 240.0.0.0/4 10 11ipset create clashhost hash:net 12ipset add clashhost 192.168.10.87 13 14ipset create otherdirect hash:net 15ipset add otherdirect 106.39.171.84 16ipset add otherdirect 106.39.171.42 17ipset add otherdirect 106.39.166.88 18 19ip rule add fwmark 1 table 100 20ip route add local default dev lo table 100 21iptables -t mangle -N clash 22iptables -t mangle -A clash -m set --match-set localnetwork dst -j RETURN 23iptables -t mangle -A clash -m set --match-set otherdirect dst -j RETURN 24iptables -t mangle -A clash -m set --match-set clashhost src -j RETURN 25iptables -t mangle -A clash -p tcp -j TPROXY --on-port 7893 --tproxy-mark 1 26iptables -t mangle -A clash -p udp -j TPROXY --on-port 7893 --tproxy-mark 1 27iptables -t mangle -A clash -p tcp -j RETURN -m mark --mark 1 28iptables -t mangle -A clash -p udp -j RETURN -m mark --mark 1 29iptables -t mangle -A PREROUTING -p tcp -j clash 30iptables -t mangle -A PREROUTING -p udp -j clash clash dns (此处1053端口是clash dns监听端口, 我是让终端的dns请求指向clash dns, 所以我并没应用这一段)
1iptables -t nat -N CLASH_DNS 2iptables -t nat -F CLASH_DNS 3iptables -t nat -A CLASH_DNS -p udp -j REDIRECT --to-port 1053 4iptables -t nat -I OUTPUT -p udp --dport 53 -j CLASH_DNS 5iptables -t nat -I PREROUTING -p udp --dport 53 -j REDIRECT --to 1053
title: debian搭建clash的透明代理
